workflow_name: Search for Databases and Tables Owned by a Specific User

steps.description: Type option 1 to select DB2 system catalog on the DB2 Admin main menu
Press Enter to navigate to the System Catalog Objects screen
Type option D to select Databases on the System Catalog Objects screen
Type the target user ID in the Owner filter field to restrict results to databases owned by that user
Press Enter to submit the filter and display the list of databases owned by the specified user
Type the T line command in the Select field next to the target database row to list its tables, views, and aliases
Press Enter to display the Tables, Views, and Aliases list for the selected database
Type the exit command at the Command field to leave DB2 Admin and return to TSO
Press Enter to execute the exit command
